top_tweets.text:
istg every Discord redesign is a literal regression

I really don't understand why Discord got it right ONCE and then from that moment regressed severely

First they got rid of tabs v2 and the Messages tab, but at least they left a workaround where double clicking on the servers https://t.co/j9cveJ3xrY
top_tweets.author: __alula
top_tweets.name: Alula
top_tweets.summary_zh: Discord 的每次改版都在退步，曾經做對過一次後就持續劣化，例如移除了 v2 分頁和訊息標籤，只留下繞道的雙擊操作。這反映出產品設計中「過度迭代反而破壞原有優勢」的常見陷阱。

top_tweets.text:
An engineer from Charlotte, North Carolina sat down in the spring of 2000 to write software for guided missile destroyers in the United States Navy. The ships needed a database that did not require a system administrator on board.

So he wrote one himself. 26 years later that https://t.co/4nZDdCUBAG
top_tweets.author: heyrimsha
top_tweets.name: Rimsha Bhardwaj
top_tweets.summary_zh: 2000 年一位工程師為美國海軍驅逐艦開發了無需系統管理員的資料庫，26 年後仍在使用。展示了從真實使用情境出發、解決具體限制的產品設計如何創造長期價值。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
